athena.capacityreservation.CfnAbout: Specifies a capacity reservation with the provided name and number of requested data processing units.

athena.capacityreservation.CapacityAssig.Description: Assigns Athena workgroups (and hence their queries) to capacity reservations. A capacity reservation can have only one capacity assignment configuration, but the capacity assignment configuration can be made up of multiple individual assignments. Each assignment specifies how Athena queries can consume capacity from the capacity reservation that their workgroup is mapped to.

athena.capacityreservation.Name.Description: The name of the capacity reservation.

athena.capacityreservation.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to the capacity reservation.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).

athena.capacityreservation.TargetDpus.Description: The number of data processing units requested.
